claims: The skill automatically sends the content of the retrospective file (which may contain sensitive internal project documentation and learnings) to an external AI service (Gemini) for summarization without explicit user consent or disclosure of data handling policies. This action is not strictly necessary for the primary purpose of post-merge integration (cleaning branches, moving specs, updating boards) and poses a risk of exposing internal documentation to a third-party API without clear necessity or user control.
